title: Id and UTCDate missing PartialEq<String> impls
description: Id and UTCDate have PartialEq<str> and PartialEq<&str>, but not PartialEq<String>. This means id == owned_string_var fails to compile; callers must write id == owned_string.as_str() or id == owned_string as &str. Since callers often hold String values from HashMap lookups or function returns, this forces awkward .as_str() calls on every comparison. The symmetric impls PartialEq<Id> for String and PartialEq<UTCDate> for String are also missing. Fix: add impl PartialEq<String> for Id, impl PartialEq<Id> for String, and matching impls for UTCDate. These are cheap and follow the same pattern as the existing str impls. Note: 5y1i.12 tracks macro consolidation for the six existing impls; these new impls should be added to the same macro.
